investors.trackRecord: ~80% multibagger hit rate on initial entries; long-term holds (5-10yr)

investors.name: Radhakishan Damani
investors.bio: Avenue Supermarts founder. Value-investing legend with ~₹2L Cr+ net worth.
investors.trackRecord: Consistent compounder. Long-term picks deliver 15-25% CAGR.

investors.name: Mukul Agrawal
investors.trackRecord: Picks 5-10 multibaggers/year. Concentrated bets in mid/small caps.

investors.name: Ashish Kacholia
investors.bio: Hawk Investments founder. Pure smallcap picker.
investors.trackRecord: ~75% smallcap multibagger hit rate (3-5x in 2-3 years).

investors.name: Vijay Kedia
investors.trackRecord: Multiple 10x picks (Atul Auto, Cera, Sudarshan Chem etc).

investors.name: Dolly Khanna
investors.bio: Managed by husband Rajiv Khanna. Sub-₹500Cr-mcap focus.

investors.name: Sunil Singhania (Abakkus AMC)
investors.bio: Ex-Reliance MF CIO. Founded Abakkus 2020. ₹15,000 Cr+ AUM.
investors.trackRecord: Quantitative + fundamental hybrid. Top decile AMC returns.

investors.name: Madhusudan Kela
investors.trackRecord: Value with growth. Long-term holds. 75%+ multibagger rate.

investors.name: Porinju Veliyath
investors.trackRecord: Turnaround/special-situations specialist. Mixed but with 5-10x outliers.
